content.content: # Download URLs on City of Heroes (dot) Dev Based on the webpage content, here are the download links found: **Mod Installer Downloads:** - Windows version: `/download/go.php?id=1` - Mac OS version: `/download/go.php?id=2` **Individual Mod Downloads:** Each mod listing contains a "View Mod" link that follows this pattern: - `/mod/[number]` (e.g., `/mod/1`, `/mod/9`, `/mod/11`, etc.) The exact HTML for the primary download buttons is: ```html Download the Mod Installer (Windows) » Download the Mod Installer (Mac OS) » ``` Individual mod pages use links structured as `href="mod/[ID_NUMBER"` to access each modification's details and download options.
